business.name: WinFlow
business.idea: AI proposal generation for SMBs and freelancers

current_goal.description: Validate with real users — collect feedback, iterate
current_goal.task: Push deploy, check formspree for submissions, get Sand to test app

landing_page.note: Landing page + app deployed together. Analytics fires on page view + CTA clicks via Formspree. Check formspree.io/login for submissions.

progress.details: First landing page in proposalforge/ directory
Name collision with proposalforge.app — pivoted to WinFlow. Built new landing page, deployed to https://thesandemon.github.io/winflow/
Waitlist live at winflow landing page. Phase 1 done. Moving to product build.

progress.action: Built WinFlow MVP app — proposal generation engine
progress.details: Full single-page app at kaito/app/index.html. Features: brief form, template-based proposal generation, AI (OpenAI) hook with fallback, PDF export via jsPDF, live preview editor, share link generation. Works standalone — no backend needed.

progress.action: Landing page + app unified and deployed to GitHub Pages
progress.details: WinFlow landing page (with Formspree waitlist + analytics) deployed to root. App at /app/. Analytics fires on page view + CTA clicks. Deploy triggered via git push.

next_goal: Check formspree for waitlist submissions. Get Sand to test app at /app/. Validate product with real users. Iterate based on feedback.
notes: WinFlow — AI proposal generation for SMBs/freelancers. Landing page + app both deployed. Landing at root (thesandemon.github.io/proposalforge/), app at /app/. Analytics active. Needs: real user feedback, iterate, auth, payments.
